title: Reminder: Research Report Discussion tomorrow!
content:
A reminder: 

 

Hi Everyone,

This Wednesday 9/24 during the lecture, we will walk you through an example of how to do your Research Report. To get most out of this, prior to coming to the Wednesday lecture please (1) revisit the syllabus Research Report instructions and (2) read the example scholarly article that will be discussed. The article is posted on the Canvas homepage under Key Course Materials, or you can access it here Download here. 

Best,

Dr. Tir
